name: West Mining Corp.
summary: West Mining Corp. operates as a is a mineral exploration company in Canada. It holds interest in the Kagoot Brook property, which comprises one mineral tenure covering an area of 4,233 hectares located near Bathhurst, New Brunswick. The company was formerly known as Ironwood Capital Corp. and changed its name to West Mining Corp. in November 2020. West Mining Corp. was founded in 2017 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
